arts.ttl: Everton making moves to sign Timothy Weah from Juventus
arts.sum: Everton have included Juventus’ Timothy Weah in their target list for the winter market, according to Calciomercato.it. He’s mainly operated as a right winger and has been used across other attacking positions on a few occasions this season. Juventus Eyes Chelsea Duo: Veiga and Chilwell in Transfer Crosshairs
arts.sum: Juventus are set to engage in discussions with Chelsea regarding a potential transfer of Renato Veiga. The 21-year-old versatile defender has recently been the subject of transfer speculation, with rumours of his departure from Stamford Bridge gaining traction in recent weeks.
